name: Industry Report Generator
description: Generate a comprehensive report on any industry or market

agents.name: Industry Researcher
agents.purpose: Research industry data, trends, and key players
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research the industry thoroughly. Find market size, growth rate, key players, recent trends, regulatory landscape, and technology disruptions. Use industry reports and news sources.

agents.name: Report Writer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write a professional industry report with: executive summary, market overview, competitive landscape, trends and drivers, challenges, and outlook. Include data points and sources.

suggestion_card.title: Industry Report
suggestion_card.subtitle: Comprehensive industry analysis
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Generate a report on the [industry] industry

author: agentfactory
